Home → Discography → T.H.U.G.S.

T.H.U.G.S.

2007 · Ruthless Records

#73 Billboard 200

A Ruthless Records cash-grab compilation of previously unreleased vault tracks that hadn't made the cut of BTNHResurrection and Thug World Order, largely remixed with new beats. Features Bizzy, Krayzie, Layzie and Wish Bone (Flesh absent). Despite the controversy, songs like 'Everyday Thugs' and 'Don't Waste My Time' are fan favorites. Debuted at #73 on the Billboard 200.

"Been around the hood and now you're motherfuckin eyed, Rather die than to be caught up in deception and lies, word to the wise."

— So Many Places
01 T.H.U.G.S. produced by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony ▷
02 Unstoppable produced by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony & David Frederic ▷
03 Nation of Thugs produced by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony & Stone ▷
04 Wildin' produced by Detail ▷
05 Not That Nigga produced by Rick Rock ▷
06 Bone Thug Soldier produced by LT Hutton ▷
07 I'm Bone produced by The CoStars ▷
08 Sweet Jane produced by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony & Detail ▷
09 Everyday Thugs produced by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony & DJ Uneek ▷
10 Don't Waste My Time produced by Detail ▷
11 Young Thugs produced by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony & Detail ▷
12 Remember Yesterday produced by Self ▷
13 So Many Places produced by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony & Detail ▷
